fields.headingSection: Secure Remote Access for Employees, Vendors, and Service Desks

fields.body:
Traditional remote access methods, like RDP and VPNs, lack granular access management controls and deep visibility into session activity. Their security deficiencies can leave organizations vulnerable to exploits via stolen credentials, session hijacking, and other attacks. These issues also make VPNs a particularly poor choice for vendor access.

With BeyondTrust Secure Remote Access solutions:

  • Apply robust least privilege and audit controls to all remote access from employees, vendors, and service desks.
  • Benefit from two VPN-less solutions: Privileged Remote Access and Remote Support, built for specific use cases. Each solution is a security leader in its class, while providing powerful productivity enhancement features.
  • Get comprehensive capabilities from the start, including security essentials, such as MFA, SSO, and SAML integrations.

fields.headingSection: Secure Remote Support for Service Desks
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
Service desks need more complete remote support solutions to solve an expanding list of use cases while meeting high standards for issue resolution. In addition, service desks are targeted by attackers because of their sensitive access and need robust security features that won’t take valuable time and resources to implement.

BeyondTrust Remote Support is a single, holistic solution built to support every device and improve service desk workflows, while also providing robust security. Enable your help desk and ITSM teams to:

  • Securely access and fix any remote device, on any platform, anywhere in the world.
  • Adhere to ITSM best practices.
  • Work seamlessly with technologies such as ServiceNow, Jira Service Manager, Zendesk, and Microsoft Teams, improving both the user and technician experience.
fields.label: Learn more

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: BeyondTrust Secure Remote Access is engineered with robust security controls and helps enable zero trust principles, zero trust architectures (ZTA), and zero trust network access (ZTNA) by enforcing least privilege, implementing segmentation, isolating assets, and monitoring and managing sessions. The solution also enables a just-in-time access model, with MFA and the option for per-session MFA, to reduce risk related to standing privileges.
fields.label: Learn more

fields.heading: FedRAMP® Authorized Secure Remote Access Solution
fields.body: BeyondTrust is FedRAMP® authorized to operate (ATO) at the moderate impact level for its Secure Remote Access (SRA) solutions, which include Remote Support and Privileged Remote Access. Your organization can fulfill the Federal Government's Cloud Computing Mandate by using BeyondTrust's FedRAMP® Moderate authorized solutions.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access enables IT and security teams to provide users with easy-to-use, secure access to critical systems.

fields.heading: Secure Remote Access
fields.body: Connect securely to critical IT systems, cloud applications, and OT environments without relying on a VPN. Every session, whether human or non-human, is authenticated, authorized, and fully auditable.

fields.heading: Session Management
fields.body: Maintain full visibility and control with detailed logs of every privileged session. Automatically record actions and permissions to simplify compliance.

fields.heading: Privileged Access Control
fields.body: Apply least privilege and just-in-time access by granting users only the remote access they need when they need it. Extend the same protections to non-human identities to reduce risk and prevent misuse.

fields.heading: Flexible Consoles & Tools
fields.body: Keep workflows efficient with familiar tools like PuTTY and Azure Data Studio, while enabling access from mobile or web consoles.

fields.heading: Streamlined Authentication
fields.body: Boost productivity and security with MFA, passwordless options, and SAML integration designed for fast onboarding and seamless access.

fields.heading: Compliance & Session Auditing
fields.body: Simplify compliance with SOC 2 ready audit trails, forensic insights, and advanced analytics available in real time or after each session.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: BeyondTrust Remote Support is designed to streamline and better secure the day-to-day workflow of internal and customer-facing help and service desks. Seamless remote support capabilities along with chat, video, and customizable approval and notification tools, make life easier for technicians.

fields.heading: Remote Access Control
fields.body: Access, diagnose, and fix devices on or off the corporate network, and deliver support with thick client, browser-based, or mobile access.

fields.heading: Efficiency & Scale
fields.body: Support growth with automation, mass deployment, and escalation tools, now with orchestration and permission controls.

fields.heading: Vaulted Credentials
fields.body: Discover, store, rotate, and inject up to 100,000 credentials securely through the Vault.

fields.heading: Real-Time Dashboard
fields.body: Monitor sessions, agents, and AI activity in a unified view with customizable metrics and shareable reports.

fields.heading: Jump Clients
fields.body: Enable unattended system access at scale with mass deployments and just-in-time controls.

fields.heading: Customization & User Experience Controls
fields.body: Personalize portals, invitations, watermarks, and surveys while branding your deployment’s unique URL and client.

fields.heading: Auditing & Compliance
fields.body: Maintain an indisputable audit trail with real-time reporting, detailed video logs, and session data.

fields.heading: Integrations
fields.body: Integrate Remote Support with your favorite CRM, ITSM, SIEM tools, and leverage our open API to create your own AI tooling.
